# seca_block_storage (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seca_storage_sku" "example" {
  name = "RD500"
}

data "seca_workspace" "example" {
  name = "workspace-1"
}

resource "seca_block_storage" "example" {
  name         = "block-storage-1"
  workspace_id = data.seca_workspace.example.name

  size_gb = 10
  sku_id  = data.seca_storage_sku.example.id

  labels      = []
  annotations = []
  extensions  = []
}

output "block_storage_id" {
  value = seca_block_storage.example.id
}
output "block_storage_tenant" {
  value = seca_block_storage.example.tenant
}
output "block_storage_workspace_id" {
  value = seca_block_storage.example.workspace_id
}
output "block_storage_region" {
  value = seca_block_storage.example.region
}

output "block_storage_sku_id" {
  value = seca_block_storage.example.sku_id
}
output "block_storage_size_gb" {
  value = seca_block_storage.example.size_gb
}
output "block_storage_source_image_id" {
  value = seca_block_storage.example.source_image_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `size_gb` (Number)
- `sku_id` (String)
- `workspace_id` (String)

### Optional

- `annotations` (Map of String)
- `extensions` (Map of String)
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `source_image_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `deleted_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `last_modified_at` (String)
- `region` (String)
- `tenant` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
# A block storage is workspace-scoped, so it is imported by a composite
# "<workspace_id>/<name>" identifier (the tenant comes from the provider configuration).
import {
  to = seca_block_storage.example
  id = "workspace-1/block-storage-1"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# A block storage is workspace-scoped, so it is imported by a composite
# "<workspace_id>/<name>" identifier (the tenant comes from the provider configuration).
terraform import seca_block_storage.example workspace-1/block-storage-1
```
